languages.text: {n}Эоганн упрямо поджимает губы и умолкает. Наконец, он отвечает так тихо, что услышать его можно, лишь склонившись ближе.{/n} "Нет. Не единственный. Смерть — тоже освобождение".
{n}Eogunn purses his lips tight in stubborn silence. At last, he speaks, his voice so faint it can only be caught by leaning in.{/n} "No. Not the only way. There is liberation in death, as well."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн упрямо поджимает губы и умолкает. Наконец, он отвечает так тихо, что услышать его можно, лишь склонившись ближе.{/n} "Нет. Не единственный. Смерть — тоже освобождение".

languages.text: {n}Eogunn presst in störrischer Stille die Lippen zusammen. Schließlich spricht er mit so leiser Stimme, dass du dich zu ihm lehnen musst, um ihn zu verstehen.{/n} "Nein. Nicht der einzige Weg. Der Tod kann aber auch befreiend sein."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn purses his lips tight in stubborn silence. At last, he speaks, his voice so faint it can only be caught by leaning in.{/n} "No. Not the only way. There is liberation in death, as well."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn presst in störrischer Stille die Lippen zusammen. Schließlich spricht er mit so leiser Stimme, dass du dich zu ihm lehnen musst, um ihn zu verstehen.{/n} "Nein. Nicht der einzige Weg. Der Tod kann aber auch befreiend sein."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, les lèvres pincées, garde le silence. Au bout de quelques instants passent, il finit par déclarer dans un souffle :{/n}« Non. Il existe une autre solution. La mort peut être considérée comme une forme de libération. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn purses his lips tight in stubborn silence. At last, he speaks, his voice so faint it can only be caught by leaning in.{/n} "No. Not the only way. There is liberation in death, as well."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, les lèvres pincées, garde le silence. Au bout de quelques instants passent, il finit par déclarer dans un souffle :{/n}« Non. Il existe une autre solution. La mort peut être considérée comme une forme de libération. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn aprieta los labios, guardando silencio. Cuando por fin responde, lo hace con voz tan baja que tienes que inclinarte para oírlo.{/n} «No. No es la única solución. La muerte también sería una liberación».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn purses his lips tight in stubborn silence. At last, he speaks, his voice so faint it can only be caught by leaning in.{/n} "No. Not the only way. There is liberation in death, as well."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn aprieta los labios, guardando silencio. Cuando por fin responde, lo hace con voz tan baja que tienes que inclinarte para oírlo.{/n} «No. No es la única solución. La muerte también sería una liberación».

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, inatçı bir sessizlikle dudaklarını sıkıca büzüyor. Sonunda konuşmaya başladığında sesi o kadar cılız çıkıyor ki ancak iyice yaklaştığında duyabiliyorsun.{/n} "Hayır. Tek yol bu değil. Ölümde de kurtuluş getirir."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn purses his lips tight in stubborn silence. At last, he speaks, his voice so faint it can only be caught by leaning in.{/n} "No. Not the only way. There is liberation in death, as well."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, inatçı bir sessizlikle dudaklarını sıkıca büzüyor. Sonunda konuşmaya başladığında sesi o kadar cılız çıkıyor ki ancak iyice yaklaştığında duyabiliyorsun.{/n} "Hayır. Tek yol bu değil. Ölümde de kurtuluş getirir."

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡倔强地抿紧嘴唇，沉默不语。终于，他开口了，声音微弱得必须凑近才能听见。{/n}“不。那不是唯一的办法。死亡，也能获得自由。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn purses his lips tight in stubborn silence. At last, he speaks, his voice so faint it can only be caught by leaning in.{/n} "No. Not the only way. There is liberation in death, as well."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡倔强地抿紧嘴唇，沉默不语。终于，他开口了，声音微弱得必须凑近才能听见。{/n}“不。那不是唯一的办法。死亡，也能获得自由。”

languages.text: {n}エオガンは、頑なな沈黙のうちに唇を固く結ぶ。ついに彼が口を開くが、その声はあまりに弱々しく、身を寄せねば聞き取れぬほどだ。{/n}「いいえ。唯一の方法ではありません。死の中にもまた、解放はあるのです」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn purses his lips tight in stubborn silence. At last, he speaks, his voice so faint it can only be caught by leaning in.{/n} "No. Not the only way. There is liberation in death, as well."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは、頑なな沈黙のうちに唇を固く結ぶ。ついに彼が口を開くが、その声はあまりに弱々しく、身を寄せねば聞き取れぬほどだ。{/n}「いいえ。唯一の方法ではありません。死の中にもまた、解放はあるのです」
